roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Warrant Discharged
Bench Warrant Issued
DEF ATC FOR MOTION TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING, FILED
/CAL:TRAILING #21011392/NP/X:DEFENDANT REFUSED/X:MOTION TO CONTINUE FILEDAND GRANTED/X:LOVE WAIVER STATUS/X:02-04-22 CONFIRMED IN DEPARTMENT 23//CONTD: TRAILING #21004723/DOP/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X:THE PEOPLE APPEARED VIA TELEPHONE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS CONTEMPT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR,/X:BAIL REMAINS AS $15,000WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CONTD:STATUS OF M97 21012031 AND SET SENTENCE/DOP/

/CAL:CUSTODY STATUS AND TO SET PRELIM/NTW60/LD:12-13-21/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSOCOMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/DEF:TO OBEY A CURFEW BETWEEN 8PM-7AM/SA1:EDGAR PUERTO/SAORD3/SAORD/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO DO COUNSELING, GROUP TO BE DETERMINED BY ACM/WS/WEAP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF/DAWF/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:10-26-21/X:60TH DAY IS 12-13-21/BAIL:75,000/X:SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CONTD:CUSTODY STATUS AND TO JOIN OTHER CASES/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/NP/ /X: PER DEPUTY, DEFENDANT IS 4011,5 TODAY,/PD/X: THE COURT PROVISIONALLY APPOINTS PD BRIAN PEARLMAN/BAIL: 75,000/X: BAIL REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SET,/CAUSE/19    DI&A P&C DOP/CONTD: INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL & CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER/TWA/DOPC/
/CAL:POSSIBLE DISPO/MO138573/VD:03-11-22 IN D22 AND 02-16-22 IN D11/
/CAL:PHC/DAWT/CONTD:POSSIBLE DISPO/DOP/
/CAL:TRAILING #21011392, LOVE WAIVER, PRE-PX M11/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:DEF ATC FOR MOTION TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:LOVE WAIVER/X:DATE OF 01-26-22 IS CONFIRMED/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:EST 1,5 HRS TOTAL/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:TO SET, TRAILING #21011392/DOP/X:(LOVE WAIVER)/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DOP/X:(LOVE WAIVER)/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DOP/X:(LOVE WAIVER)/
/CAL: STATUS OF 21012031 AND TO SET SN/X:LOVE WAIVER STATUS/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:DISMISSAL/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:15,000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 4TH OF 4 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO NEGOTIATED DISPO IN #21002688 (DISMISSAL)/
/CAL:CUSTODY CONDITION, LOVE WAIVER/X:COUNSEL APPEARED VIA ZOOM,/X:PREHEARING CONF ON 10-27-21 IS CONFIRMED,/DOP/
